name: ActivityStats
description: Tracks per-server message counts, received reaction counts, and voice time with leaderboard commands, optional rank roles, and optional Economy cash rewards.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: ActivityStats loaded! Use `/messages`, `/reactions`, `/voice`, `/topmessages`, `/topreacts`, or `/topvoice` after syncing slash commands. Prefix commands still work with `[p]activitystats` and related commands. Use `[p]activitystats rewards` to manage Economy cash rewards.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores message IDs mapped to author IDs, per-user message counts, per-channel message counts, per-message reaction snapshots, per-user received reaction counters, per-user voice time totals, and active voice session start timestamps. It does not store message content or voice audio. Administrators can clear stored data with `[p]activitystats reset`.
